name: dashboard-myhonda
description: SAGzap myHonda — monorepo (API Express + Frontend React/Vite)

scripts.dev: concurrently --names API,FRONT --prefix-colors red,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:front"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:front
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:front
scripts.install:all: cd api && yarn install && cd ../front && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
